	rule_listr
z4Generator that yields a wrapped, expanded rule list.N)
expand)
wrapper_classZ
unexpanded_ruleZ
expanded_ruler
_expand_generatorB
Difference._expand_generatorTc
        Standard diff of two sets.
        Parameters:
        left        An iterable
        right       An iterable
        Return:
        tuple       (added, removed, matched)
        added       Set of items in right but not left
        removed     Set of items in left but not right
        matched     Set of items in both left and right.  This is
                    in the form of tuples with the matching item
                    from left and right
        
keyzDMatched items assertion failure (this is an SETools bug), {0} != {1}c
origin
	<genexpr>

SymbolWrapperz
    General wrapper for policy symbols, e.g. types, roles
    to provide a diff-specific equality operation based
    on its name.
